'''âs-k-l''' ('''sakala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:netcop|netcop]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-k-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:netcop|netcop]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-k-l
|-
! Lemma
| sakala
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sakalithi|sakalithi]] || [[word:sakaliji|sakaliji]] || [[word:sakalishi|sakalishi]] || [[word:sakali|sakali]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sakaluthuth|sakaluthuth]] || [[word:sakalujuj|sakalujuj]] || [[word:sakalushush|sakalushush]] || [[word:sakal|sakal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sakaluthu|sakaluthu]] || [[word:sakaluju|sakaluju]] || [[word:sakalushu|sakalushu]] || [[word:sakalu|sakalu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sakalufuth|sakalufuth]] || [[word:sakalufuj|sakalufuj]] || [[word:sakalufush|sakalufush]] || [[word:sakaluf|sakaluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sakalethe|sakalethe]] || [[word:sakaleje|sakaleje]] || [[word:sakaleshe|sakaleshe]] || [[word:sakale|sakale]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sakalothoth|sakalothoth]] || [[word:sakalojoj|sakalojoj]] || [[word:sakaloshosh|sakaloshosh]] || [[word:sakal|sakal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sakalotho|sakalotho]] || [[word:sakalojo|sakalojo]] || [[word:sakalosho|sakalosho]] || [[word:sakalo|sakalo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sakalofoth|sakalofoth]] || [[word:sakalofoj|sakalofoj]] || [[word:sakalofosh|sakalofosh]] || [[word:sakalof|sakalof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sakalĂŠthĂŠ|sakalĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:sakalĂŠjĂŠ|sakalĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:sakalĂŠshĂŠ|sakalĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:sakalĂŠ|sakalĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sakalathath|sakalathath]] || [[word:sakalajaj|sakalajaj]] || [[word:sakalashash|sakalashash]] || [[word:sakal|sakal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sakalatha|sakalatha]] || [[word:sakalaja|sakalaja]] || [[word:sakalasha|sakalasha]] || [[word:sakala|sakala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sakalafath|sakalafath]] || [[word:sakalafaj|sakalafaj]] || [[word:sakalafash|sakalafash]] || [[word:sakalaf|sakalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:sakalasha|sakalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosakalasha|gosakalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisakalasha|gokisakalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:sakalnĂŒsha|sakalnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosakalnknĂŒsha|gosakalnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisakalnĂŒsha|gokisakalnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sakalshĂ«sha|sakalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosakalnkshĂ«sha|gosakalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisakalshĂ«sha|gokisakalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sakalrosha|sakalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosakalnkrosha|gosakalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisakalrosha|gokisakalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sakalmusha|sakalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosakalnkmusha|gosakalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisakalmusha|gokisakalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sakalsherasha|sakalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosakalnksherasha|gosakalnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisakalsherasha|gokisakalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:sakalngasha|sakalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosakalnkngasha|gosakalnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisakalngasha|gokisakalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sakalyasha|sakalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosakalnkyasha|gosakalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisakalyasha|gokisakalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sakalyamasha|sakalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosakalnkyamasha|gosakalnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisakalyamasha|gokisakalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sakalnĂŒshĂ«sha|sakalnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosakalnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gosakalnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisakalnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokisakalnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sakalnĂŒrosha|sakalnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosakalnknĂŒrosha|gosakalnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisakalnĂŒrosha|gokisakalnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sakalnĂŒmusha|sakalnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosakalnknĂŒmusha|gosakalnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisakalnĂŒmusha|gokisakalnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sakalshĂ«nĂŒsha|sakalshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosakalnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gosakalnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisakalshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokisakalshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sakalshĂ«rosha|sakalshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosakalnkshĂ«rosha|gosakalnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisakalshĂ«rosha|gokisakalshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sakalshĂ«musha|sakalshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosakalnkshĂ«musha|gosakalnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisakalshĂ«musha|gokisakalshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sakalronĂŒsha|sakalronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosakalnkronĂŒsha|gosakalnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisakalronĂŒsha|gokisakalronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sakalroshĂ«sha|sakalroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosakalnkroshĂ«sha|gosakalnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisakalroshĂ«sha|gokisakalroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sakalromusha|sakalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosakalnkromusha|gosakalnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisakalromusha|gokisakalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sakalmunĂŒsha|sakalmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosakalnkmunĂŒsha|gosakalnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisakalmunĂŒsha|gokisakalmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sakalmushĂ«sha|sakalmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosakalnkmushĂ«sha|gosakalnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisakalmushĂ«sha|gokisakalmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sakalmurosha|sakalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosakalnkmurosha|gosakalnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisakalmurosha|gokisakalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:sakal|sakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sĂŠkĂŠl|sĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hosakal|hosakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosĂŠkĂŠl|hosĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosakal|hohosakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosĂŠkĂŠl|hohosĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒsakal|nĂŒsakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒsĂŠkĂŠl|nĂŒsĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒsakal|nĂŒnĂŒsakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒsĂŠkĂŠl|nĂŒnĂŒsĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻsakal|nĂŻsakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻsĂŠkĂŠl|nĂŻsĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻsakal|nĂŻnĂŻsakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻsĂŠkĂŠl|nĂŻnĂŻsĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lusakal|lusakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lusĂŠkĂŠl|lusĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusakal|lulusakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusĂŠkĂŠl|lulusĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lisakal|lisakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lisĂŠkĂŠl|lisĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisakal|lilisakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisĂŠkĂŠl|lilisĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kosakal|kosakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosĂŠkĂŠl|kosĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosakal|kokosakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosĂŠkĂŠl|kokosĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kesakal|kesakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesĂŠkĂŠl|kesĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesakal|kekesakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesĂŠkĂŠl|kekesĂŠkĂŠl]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
